name: Variants tab is not visible for a non-Template part
steps:
Given a part 'Resistor 10k' is not marked as a Template part
Given a user is logged in
When the user navigates to the part detail page for 'Resistor 10k'
Then the 'Variants' tab is not visible in the tab bar

name: Variants tab is visible only for Template parts
steps:
Given a part 'Widget Base' is marked as a Template part and has two variants 'Widget-Red' and 'Widget-Blue'
Given a user is logged in
When the user navigates to the part detail page for 'Widget Base'
Then the 'Variants' tab is visible and displays 'Widget-Red' and 'Widget-Blue' in the variants list
